summary: Excellent audience recording of an unknown show, praised for its sound quality
review: The sole review highlights a superb audience capture that delivers clear and enjoyable listening despite the lack of details about the performance itself. With a perfect five‑star rating, listeners can expect an excellent tape quality even though no musical specifics are provided.
